raw_blocks.text: 1.1 Why sleep matters
1.1 Why sleep matters

Regular habits compound over time, and small daily choices shape long-term outcomes more than bursts of motivation. This section walks through the practical steps, the common mistakes, and the evidence-based guidance that readers can apply immediately in their own routine.
